# 11.1. Gantt Chart (Status colors)

~~~mermaid
gantt
    title Mermaid renderer schedule
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    todayMarker off
    section Spike
    DOM shim: done, 2026-04-01, 7d
    section Integration
    Production path: active, 2026-04-08, 14d
~~~
